# freeipa Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) FreeIPA host address (e.g. ipa.example.com).

### Optional

- `insecure` (Boolean) Bypass SSL verification.
- `keytab_path` (String) Path to Kerberos Keytab file.
- `krb5_conf` (String) Path to Kerberos configuration file krb5.conf.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) FreeIPA administrator password.
- `realm` (String) Kerberos Realm.
- `username` (String) FreeIPA administrator username.
